scripts.build: node -e "console.log('🧹 Cleaning old builds...'); try{require('fs').unlinkSync('./frontend/package-lock.json')}catch(e){}; try{require('fs').rmSync('./backend/public',{recursive:true,force:true})}catch(e){}; console.log('Building frontend...')" && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && cd backend && npm install && echo '✅ Build complete!'
